'''Morn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] member of the criminal syndicate [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]]. Having attained the rank of [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]], Morn was based on his homeworld [[Dac/Legends|Dac]] and oversaw Black Sun operations in that sector of the galaxy. His murder was the first move of Maul's destruction of Black Sun's leadership, driving the other Vigos, along with Garyn, to meet at Garyn's [[Black Sun Fortress|castle]] on [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]], where they could be [[Mission to Ralltiir|slaughtered]] in a group in [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]].

==Biography==
A [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] from [[Dac/Legends|Dac]],<ref name="TCSWE" /> Morn became involved in the criminal organization [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]], eventually rising through the ranks and attaining the title [[Vigo/Legends|vigo]], making him one of the nine [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenants]] of the syndicate. Morn was stationed on Dac, controlling all of Black Sun's operations in that sector of space.<ref name="DM3" />

Following the Black Sun [[Bombing of Sojourn|attack]] on [[Sojourn (moon)|Sojourn]], the Vigos of Black Sun unknowingly became the targets of the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] and his [[Sith Master/Legends|master]], [[Darth Plagueis/Legends|Darth Plagueis]]. Due to time restraints, the Sith would not be able to hunt down the Vigos separately and kill them; instead the Sith would need to lure them together so they could die at once. In order to draw them out Sidious decided to send his [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]], [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]], to kill Morn following the initial execution of Vigo [[Darnada]].<ref name="SWDP">[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']]</ref>

Storming Morn's stronghold on Dac, Maul killed all of Morn's guards and the members of his court, leaving the Vigo for last. As Morn crawled through the corpses of his followers and protectors, the [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] Sith murdered the Mon Calamari with a strike from his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].<ref name="DM3" />
